summary: Frontend UI/UX testing completed successfully. All requested features are working correctly: Spanish translations (no raw key fallbacks in ES/PT/EN), uniform Lucide icons in Apps Compatibles section, real Apple/Google SVG logos in Download section, expandable Install Guide with 5 steps and troubleshooting, mobile sidebar with all nav items, and buy buttons navigation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend UI/UX features tested and working: 1) Header nav items display correctly in Spanish (Descargar, Comprar Ahora, all nav items), 2) Mobile sidebar opens and shows all items including Inicio (Home) and Comprar Ahora button, 3) Apps Compatibles shows Instacart/DoorDash/Spark with uniform Lucide icons (ShoppingBag, Truck, Package), 4) Download section has APK button, Install Guide expandable with 5 steps and troubleshooting, real Google Play and Apple Store SVG logos, 5) Pricing section shows 3 buy buttons at $20.00 USD each with uniform icons, 6) Language selector switches between EN/ES/PT without raw key fallbacks, 7) All navigation links scroll to correct sections

tested_features.details: Shows: Características, Cómo Funciona, Precios, Descargar, FAQ with 'Comprar Ahora' button
Opens correctly, shows Inicio, all nav items, and Comprar Ahora button with uniform icons
Shows Instacart, DoorDash, Spark Driver with uniform Lucide icons (ShoppingBag, Truck, Package) - no emojis
APK download button present, 'Como Instalar el APK' expandable button works, real Google Play and Apple Store SVG logos displayed
Expands to show 5 steps with icons and troubleshooting section
3 buy buttons (Instacart, DoorDash, Spark Driver) at $20.00 USD each with uniform ShoppingBag icons
Works for EN, ES, PT - no raw key fallbacks visible in any language
All nav links (features, how-it-works, pricing, download-apps, faq) scroll to correct sections
Clicking buy buttons navigates to /purchase/{appName} page correctly
